'''Nance''' was a patron of [[Vanster Enan's Sop House]] during [[Gadrin]]'s celebrations for the 200th anniversary of the city's founding. He watched the arm-wrestling matches between [[Oosk]] and [[Varoca]], and was willing to take bets on the matches, giving 3:1 odds against Oosk. Nance was a small [[Human/Legends|Human]] who dressed in a [[gray]] [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]].

{{Char-stub}}
